# Moda - Work Management System

> Moda is a work management system for planning, managing, and creating associations across work items, projects, teams, planning, and products.

## Overview

Moda helps organizations track, align, and deliver work. It follows Clean Architecture with Domain-Driven Design principles, organized as a modular monolith.

## Documentation

- [User Guide](/user-guide/): End user documentation for all Moda features
- [Contributing](/contributing/): Developer documentation for contributing to the codebase
- [Architecture](/contributing/architecture): System design, Clean Architecture, and DDD patterns
- [Domain Model](/reference/domain-model): Core domain concepts and entity relationships
- [API Reference](/reference/api): REST API endpoints and usage
- [Technology Stack](/reference/technology-stack): Libraries, frameworks, and tools

## Domains

Moda is organized into bounded contexts:

- **Work Management** - Work items, work processes, workspaces, and workflows
- **Organization** - Teams, employees, and organizational structure
- **Planning** - Planning intervals and iterations
- **Goals** - Objectives and key results (OKR framework)
- **Project Portfolio Management** - Projects and portfolio lifecycle
- **Strategic Management** - Strategic themes and alignment
- **App Integration** - External system connections (Azure DevOps, Microsoft Graph)
- **Links** - Cross-entity relationship management

## Key Concepts

- **Ownership**: Objects are either "Owned" (managed in Moda) or "Managed" (synced from external systems, read-only in Moda)
- **CQRS**: All operations are commands (writes) or queries (reads) via MediatR
- **Result Pattern**: Business operations return Result<T> instead of throwing exceptions
- **Feature Flags**: Features are gated via Microsoft.FeatureManagement

## Technology

- Backend: .NET 10, ASP.NET Core, EF Core, SQL Server, MediatR, Hangfire
- Frontend: Next.js 16, React 19, TypeScript, Ant Design, Redux Toolkit
- Auth: Microsoft Entra ID or local JWT
- Observability: OpenTelemetry, Serilog
